mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_message (server_msg_id, client_msg_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, msg_type, content, status) VALUES (#{serverMsgId}, #{clientMsgId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{msgType}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM im_message WHERE server_msg_id = #{serverMsgId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM im_message WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM im_message WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND client_msg_id = #{clientMsgId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM im_message WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND ( (created_at > #{cursorCreatedAt}) OR (created_at = #{cursorCreatedAt} AND id > #{cursorId}) ) ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
SELECT 1 FROM im_message WHERE msg_type = 'FILE' AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(CAST(content AS JSON), '$.fileId')) = #{fileId} AND (from_user_id = #{userId} OR to_user_id = #{userId}) LIMIT 1
